value.fullName: High. Prospect must buy this month
value.label: High. Prospect must buy this month

value.fullName: Medium. Prospect will likely buy this month
value.label: Medium. Prospect will likely buy this month

value.fullName: Low. Prospect may decide to buy now
value.label: Low. Prospect may decide to buy now

value.fullName: No sense of urgency to buy now
value.label: No sense of urgency to buy now
